test_designs.module_summary: This module defines the ToolCallingAgentLanguage class, which constructs prompts for tool-calling agents, extracts messages from responses, and retrieves tool calls from messages.

test_targets.name: construct_prompt

scenarios.name: happy_path
scenarios.description: Construct a prompt with valid actions, goals, and memory.

scenarios.name: empty_goals
scenarios.description: Construct a prompt with no goals.

scenarios.name: no_terminal_actions
scenarios.description: Construct a prompt with actions that are not terminal.

notes: Ensure that the prompt is formatted correctly.

scenarios.name: happy_path
scenarios.description: Extract the message from a valid response.

scenarios.name: invalid_response_format
scenarios.description: Handle a response that does not have the expected structure.

test_targets.name: get_tool_calls

scenarios.name: happy_path
scenarios.description: Extract tool calls from a valid message.

scenarios.name: no_tool_calls
scenarios.description: Handle a message with no tool calls.

scenarios.name: invalid_tool_call_format
scenarios.description: Handle a message with improperly formatted tool calls.

notes: Ensure that the tool calls are parsed correctly.

scenarios.name: invalid_json
scenarios.description: Raise ValueError for invalid JSON strings.

scenarios.name: unsupported_type
scenarios.description: Raise ValueError for unsupported argument types.
